'''fathozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideboundness|hideboundness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideboundness|hideboundness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæthezheth|fæthezheth]] || [[word:fæthezhej|fæthezhej]] || [[word:fæthezhesh|fæthezhesh]] || [[word:fæthezhe|fæthezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothozhoth|fathothozhoth]] || [[word:fathothozhoj|fathothozhoj]] || [[word:fathothozhosh|fathothozhosh]] || [[word:fathothozho|fathothozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathozhoth|fathozhoth]] || [[word:fathozhoj|fathozhoj]] || [[word:fathozhosh|fathozhosh]] || [[word:fathozho|fathozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofzhoth|fathofzhoth]] || [[word:fathofzhoj|fathofzhoj]] || [[word:fathofzhosh|fathofzhosh]] || [[word:fathofzhof|fathofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathozhotho|fathozhotho]] || [[word:fathozhojo|fathozhojo]] || [[word:fathozhosho|fathozhosho]] || [[word:fathozhoko|fathozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathozhoth|fathozhoth]] || [[word:fathozhoj|fathozhoj]] || [[word:fathozhosh|fathozhosh]] || [[word:fathozho|fathozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathozhothol|fathozhothol]] || [[word:fathozhojol|fathozhojol]] || [[word:fathozhoshol|fathozhoshol]] || [[word:fathozhokol|fathozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathozhothotho|fathozhothotho]] || [[word:fathozhojojo|fathozhojojo]] || [[word:fathozhoshosho|fathozhoshosho]] || [[word:fathozhoko|fathozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathozhothon|fathozhothon]] || [[word:fathozhojon|fathozhojon]] || [[word:fathozhoshon|fathozhoshon]] || [[word:fathozhokon|fathozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathozhothoro|fathozhothoro]] || [[word:fathozhojoro|fathozhojoro]] || [[word:fathozhoshoro|fathozhoshoro]] || [[word:fathozhokoro|fathozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
